title: Senior Software Engineer - Google India Consulting Pvt Ltd - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Google India Consulting Pvt Ltd - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
We at Google India Consulting Pvt Ltd are looking for an experienced Senior Software Engineer based out of Faridabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Google India Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Google India Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Google India Consulting Pvt Ltd!
